family_summary: An ISIS assault and urban siege of the Kurdish town of Kobani/Ayn al-Arab, defended by Kurdish forces with later coalition air support.
notes: Top-level start_date is approximate and marks the near-city siege phase inferred from Reuters descriptions of a nearly three-week assault by 2014-10-06. Episode-level estimation starts only once city-core civilian exposure becomes sourceable on 2014-10-06.
